hero.quoteFull: A jack of all trades is a master of none, but oftentimes better than a master of one.
hero.subline: That’s pretty much how I work. :)

intro.heading: Hi. I’m Sib.
intro.lead: I design brands, graphics, campaigns, and whatever interesting challenge comes next.
intro.statementRest: . Not an agency. Just a curious designer who enjoys making things look good and make sense for the business.

why.title: You talk to me.
why.body: No sales rep, no account manager. Just me, from the first hello to the final file.

why.title: I wear a few hats.
why.body: Branding, design, a little marketing. One person who sees the whole picture.

why.title: I actually care.
why.body: Your project isn’t one of fifty. I want it to be good just as much as you do.

why.title: Straight to the source.
why.body: To be frank, a lot of the agencies you’d hire quietly pass this kind of work to people like me anyway. You can just skip the middle step.
